# Silhouette Apartments building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: silhouette-apartments-1233-n-highland-ave
- Address: 1233 N Highland Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90038
- Primary URL: https://silhouettela.com/
- Management company: Greystar
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [review] Current listings continue to show central air conditioning, pet-friendly terms, and active inventory. Source: Zillow (https://www.zillow.com/apartments/los-angeles-ca/silhouette-apartments/CjHsns/). Note: Zillow showed pet-friendly homes with central air conditioning and active inventory.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows a 5.0/5 rating but only across 2 reviews, so the signal is positive but very shallow. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/silhouette-apartments-los-angeles-ca/7h539fy/). Note: Apartments.com displayed 5.0 stars from 2 reviews.
- [review] RentCafe continues to show dozens of available one- and two-bedroom units, which confirms leasing activity and category fit. Source: RentCafe (https://www.rentcafe.com/apartments/ca/los-angeles/silhouette0/default.aspx). Note: RentCafe showed 32 available units and secure online application flow.

## Open questions
- Confirm package handling, parking, and whether current resident evidence remains thin.

## Notes
Tour candidate with thin evidence. The building matches the target profile well on paper and current listings show real inventory, but it is still new enough that the review base is not yet deep.
